data.title: ACMI Secures $50 Million Award to Accelerate Production Innovation in Energetics
data.description: A company called ACMI Federal has revealed that it secured a $50 million contract from Naval Surface Warfare Center Indian Head Division (NSWC IHD) for the purpose of enhancing energetics capabilities through a joint research and development initiative. Additionally, ACMI intends to construct the Maryland Energetics Innovation Hub (MEIH) in close proximity to NSWC IHD. The MEIH is anticipated to facilitate collaboration among industry, academia, and various other entities.

data.title: CoreWeave Announces Pricing of $1,000 million of 9.750% Senior Notes due 2031
data.description: In Livingston, New Jersey, CoreWeave, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV) disclosed details of a private offering, pricing $1,000 million in aggregate principal amount of 9.750% senior notes due in 2031. The maturity date for these Notes is set for October 1, 2031. The closing of this offering is anticipated to take place on April 21, 2026, pending standard closing conditions. The Notes will be issued at an issue price of 102.000% of their principal amount.
AB Science releases latest data on its medical trials, featuring critical milestones.

data.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP Announces Shareholder Investigation of ICU Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ICUI)
data.description: Law firm Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP has disclosed an inquiry into ICU Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ICUI) on April 16, 2026, to represent the interests of the company's shareholders. The investigation is centered on evaluating potential breaches of fiduciary responsibilities by ICU Medical's directors. The examination aims to determine if the directors acted in the best interests of the shareholders and the company amidst undisclosed figures and undisclosed market conditions.

data.title: As Agentic AI Adoption Accelerates, Rubrik Warns of Growing Security Gaps
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, a new study by Rubrik Zero Labs reveals that the deployment of AI agents in enterprises is progressing faster than the ability to protect them. Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK) released the report, which highlights that organizations are implementing autonomous systems without sufficient security measures in place, leading to a disconnect between advancement and safety. The research, based on a survey of over 1,600 IT and security executives, indicates that 86% anticipate AI agents surpassing the ability to secure them effectively.

data.title: Cataclean debuts in diesel market with new cleaner for diesel exhaust systems and DPF.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global economy is expected to grow by 4.2% in 2022, marking a significant recovery from the 3.4% growth seen in 2021. The growth is largely driven by increased consumer spending, government stimulus packages, and the easing of pandemic restrictions. In addition, world trade is projected to expand by 5.5% this year, up from 4.7% in 2021. However, there are concerns about rising inflation rates and supply chain disruptions that could dampen the economic recovery. Central banks are closely monitoring these developments and are prepared to adjust their policies accordingly. The report also highlights the importance of continued vaccination efforts and targeted fiscal measures to support the ongoing recovery.

data.title: Bitcoin's surge is uncertain as demand is low, with value below active holder's break-even point, limiting price boost.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading below the profitability threshold for active holders. This means that the cost to mine or acquire Bitcoin is higher than its current market value. Despite early signals of demand for Bitcoin, its price is being minimally supported. This situation indicates a challenging period for Bitcoin holders and investors.

data.title: CPI and Fiserv Forge Major Alliance to Modernize Instant Issuance Experience for Financial Institutions
data.description: In Denver, CPI and Fiserv are deepening their partnership to enhance instant card issuance services for banks and credit unions through Card@Once. This collaboration aims to modernize the process, facilitating quicker card fulfillment for financial institutions.

data.title: World-renowned astronaut Koichi Wakata to speak at Florida Poly commencement
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida, on April 16, 2026, Florida Polytechnic University announced that the esteemed astronaut Dr. Koichi Wakata will be the commencement speaker for the class of 2026. Dr. Wakata, notable for being the first Japanese commander of the International Space Station (ISS), will address the graduating students. His achievement marks a significant milestone as he became the inaugural individual from Japan to hold this prestigious position.
What's Going On With AT&T Stock Thursday?

data.title: Ericsson initiates share buyback program
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Ericsson revealed its decision to commence a share repurchase program authorized during the Annual General Meeting on March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved this move, indicating the company's intention to buy back its own shares. The authorization granted during the AGM allowed Ericsson to execute this initiative, signaling a strategic financial move by the telecommunications company. This announcement comes as Ericsson aims to enhance shareholder value and potentially improve its market position.
Wall Street Hits New Records, Oil Surges On Hormuz Toll Drama: What's Moving Markets Thursday?

data.title: DENSO Manufacturing Canada Again Earns Top Employer Honors
data.description: For the third consecutive year, DENSO Manufacturing Canada, Inc. (DMCN) has been named one of the Top Employers in Southwest Ontario. Additionally, for the fourth year running, they have also been recognized as one of the Top Employers in the Waterloo Area. DENSO, a prominent mobility supplier, is the parent company of DMCN. The awards were announced on April 16, 2026, underscoring the company's commitment to a supportive and engaging work environment.

data.title: ThriveMD Announces the Launch of the Elite Longevity Assessment, Redefining Precision Diagnostics for Proactive Health
data.description: ThriveMD, a prominent concierge medicine and longevity health provider based in Denver, has recently introduced a cutting-edge data-driven tool that delves into biological age, cardiac risk, and early-stage cancer indicators. This innovative diagnostic experience offers an in-depth look into key health metrics. The launch, which took place on April 16, 2026, signals a significant advancement in personalized healthcare.

data.title: Corvias Earns National Community Awards for Outstanding Living Experience
data.description: Corvias revealed their success in winning a 2025 SatisFacts Community Award, showcasing remarkable resident satisfaction levels in customer service, maintenance, and daily experiences within their military housing communities. This recognition is a result of surveys conducted amongst approximately 12,000 military families residing in six states. Impressively, Corvias communities attained an average score of 4.6 out of 5.0 across their portfolio, significantly exceeding the required standard for qualification. Additionally, the company was granted an "excellent" rating.
